nasb.text: Moreover, there were at my table one hundred and fifty Jews and officials, besides those who came to us from the nations that were around us.

esv.text: Moreover, there were at my table 150 men, Jews and officials, besides those who came to us from the nations that were around us.

cnv.text: 在我桌上吃飯的，有一百五十個猶大人和官長，還有那些從我們四圍外族來到我們這裡的人；

ccb.text: 除了从周围外邦来到我们这里的人之外，还有一百五十名犹太人和官员与我一同吃饭。
